dialog.speaker: narrator
dialog.text: You wake up in your new apartment in Spain. The morning sunlight streams through the blinds.

dialog.speaker: player
dialog.text: Good morning. You must be Alex?

dialog.speaker: alex
dialog.text: That's right! Welcome to Spain! I'm Alex Thompson, your roommate for the month.
dialog.spanish: ¡Así es! Bienvenido a España. Soy Alex Thompson, tu compañero de piso por este mes.

dialog.speaker: player
dialog.text: Thanks for having me. I'm excited to be here.
dialog.spanish: Gracias por recibirme. Estoy emocionado de estar aquí.

dialog.speaker: alex
dialog.text: I made some coffee. Would you like some before we head out? Your language school orientation starts at 10:00.
dialog.spanish: He hecho café. ¿Quieres antes de que salgamos? La orientación de tu escuela de idiomas empieza a las 10:00.

dialog.speaker: alex
dialog.text: It's about 8:30 now. The school is a 15-minute walk from here. I'll show you the way today.
dialog.spanish: Son las 8:30 aproximadamente. La escuela está a 15 minutos a pie desde aquí. Te mostraré el camino hoy.
